heading: Powers
label: 21106 Powers
text: The corporation has only the powers provided in its bylaws and articles of incorporation filed in each State in which it is incorporated.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)2110636:2402., , .June 12, 1984Pub. L. 98–314, § 298 Stat. 237The words “and subject to the laws of such State or States” are omitted as unnecessary.
